listitem.para: What are traditional verbal and nonverbal communications practices in Ukrainian culture?
How do Ukrainians value their time and punctuality?
What are the decision-making practices in current Ukrainian immigrants?
List one healthcare condition in Ukrainians in each of the three categories: environment, lifestyle, and genetics. What can you do to decrease the incidence and prevalence of these diseases?
What are common high-risk health behaviors in Ukrainian immigrants? Include some strategies for reducing them.
What are fertility control practices in Ukrainians? What education would you provide to the family about childbirth and contraception practices?
Many Ukrainians are not seeking psychiatric care. What is a reason for this? What can you do to decrease their fear?
Identify traditional folk treatments. How would you know that this treatment is being used?
Identify some practices women use during pregnancy.
Identify some cultural traditional Ukrainian practices. Which of them might have harmful effects?
